seoTitle: West Montagu vs West Moonah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between West Montagu and West Moonah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: West Montagu vs West Moonah: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West Montagu and West Moonah.
heading: West Montagu vs West Moonah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West Montagu, Tasmania and West Moonah, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Montagu has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to West Moonah (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is West Montagu or West Moonah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West Montagu has a flood risk score of 30/100, while West Moonah scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West Montagu scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. West Moonah scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West Montagu or West Moonah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Montagu has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
